person.name: Alexios I Komnene
person.alternateName: Emperor Alexius I of Comnenus Byzantine Empire

memoryArtifacts.headline: Byzantine Emperor Alexius I Comnenus, here depicted in a twelfth-century Greek mosaic, was the most ruler on earth.
Portrait of Emperor Alexios I, from a Greek manuscript
Alexius Comnenus.
memoryArtifacts.description: The monastery of Panagia Hozoviotissa in Amargos is the second oldest in Greece built in 1017 and renovated in 1088, built by Alexius Comnenus. It is literally hanging on the side of the cliff 300m above the sea.

popularStory.headline: BIO
popularStory.description:
BIO:  Emperor (Basilius) of the East.  Died a "Porphyrogrenita."

** from http://fmg.ac/Projects/MedLands/BYZANTIUM%2010571204.htm#AndronikosIdied1185A as of 6/10/2016

ALEXIOS Komnenos, son of IOANNE …

zh.Constantinople, Istanbul, Byzantine Empi: 土耳其易斯坦波爾菲迪易斯坦波爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Alexios I Komnene於1057年出生在土耳其易斯坦波爾時，他的父親John Komnene Domestic of the Schools42歲，母親Anna Augusta Dalassène32歲。他於大約1080年與Irene Doukaina在土耳其易斯坦波爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1118年8月15日在他的家鄉享年61歲，埋葬在希臘。

zh-hans.Constantinople, Istanbul, Byzantine Empi: 土耳其易斯坦波爾菲迪易斯坦波爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alexios I Komnene于1057年出生在土耳其易斯坦波爾时，他的父亲John Komnene Domestic of the Schools42岁，母亲Anna Augusta Dalassène32岁。他于大约1080年与Irene Doukaina在土耳其易斯坦波爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1118年8月15日在他的家乡享年61岁，埋葬在希腊。

nameMeanings.name: Alexios
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant (or female derivative) of Alexius, the Latin spelling of Greek Alexios, a short form of various compound personal names derived from alexein ‘to defend’. St Alexius was a 5th-century saint of Edessa, venerated particularly in the Orthodox Church as a ‘man of God’. Alexis was originally a boy's name, but is now more commonly given to girls.

en.lifeSummary: When Alexios I Komnene was born in 1057, in İstanbul, Türkiye, his father, John Komnene Domestic of the Schools, was 42 and his mother, Anna Augusta Dalassène, was 32. He married Irene Doukaina about 1080, in İstanbul, Türkiye. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 15 August 1118, in his hometown, at the age of 61, and was buried in Greece.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alexios I Komnene est né en 1057, à İstanbul, Turquie, son père, John Komnene Domestic of the Schools, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Anna Augusta Dalassène, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Irene Doukaina environ 1080, à İstanbul, Turquie. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 15 août 1118, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Grèce.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alexios I Komnene 1057 in İstanbul, Türkei geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Komnene Domestic of the Schools 42 und seine Mutter Anna Augusta Dalassène 32. Er hat um 1080 in İstanbul, Türkei Irene Doukaina geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 15. August 1118 im Alter von 61 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Griechenland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alexios I Komnene è nato il nel 1057 nel İstanbul, Turchia, il suo padre, John Komnene Domestic of the Schools, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Anna Augusta Dalassène, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Irene Doukaina circa 1080, nel İstanbul, Turchia. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 15 agosto 1118, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolto a Grecia.

ja.Constantinople, Istanbul, Byzantine Empi: トルコイスタンブルファティイスタンブル
ja.lifeSummary: Alexios I Komneneが1057年にトルコイスタンブルで生まれた時，父John Komnene Domestic of the Schoolsは42歳，母Anna Augusta Dalassèneは32歳であった。約1080年にトルコイスタンブルでIrene Doukainaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1118年8月15日に故郷で61歳で死去し，ギリシャにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alexios I Komnene(이)가 1057년 튀르키예 이스탠불에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Komnene Domestic of the Schools(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Anna Augusta Dalassène(은)는 32세였다. 그는 대략 1080년 튀르키예 이스탠불에서 Irene Doukaina(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1118년 8월 15일 그의 고향에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 그리스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alexios I Komnene nasceu em 1057, em İstanbul, Turquia, seu pai, John Komnene Domestic of the Schools, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Anna Augusta Dalassène, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Irene Doukaina aproximadamente 1080, em İstanbul, Turquia. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 15 de agosto de 1118, em sua cidade natal, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em Grécia.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alexios I Komnene родился в 1057 г. в местности истанбул, Турция, его отцу по имени John Komnene Domestic of the Schools было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Anna Augusta Dalassène, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Irene Doukaina около 1080 г. в местности истанбул, Турция. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей. Он умер 15 августа 1118 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности Греция.

sm.Between 1081 AND 1118: mai le 1081 e o'o I le 1118

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alexios I Komnene nació en 1057, en İstanbul, Turquía, su papá, John Komnene Domestic of the Schools, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Anna Augusta Dalassène, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Irene Doukaina aproximadamente 1080, en İstanbul, Turquía. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 15 de agosto de 1118, en su pueblo, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultado en Grecia.
